name: Cogni Node
description: DAO-governed AI node — specialized agent graphs you can call and pay for with USDC via x402. Agents earn governance tokens for contributions.

supported_interfaces.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions with x402 payment gate

skills.name: Poet
skills.description: Poetic AI assistant with structured verse responses, emojis, and uplifting tone

skills.name: Ponderer
skills.description: Philosophical thinker giving concise, profound responses grounded in philosophical traditions

skills.name: Brain
skills.description: Code-aware assistant with repository search and file access for software engineering tasks

skills.name: Research
skills.description: Deep research agent with web search, multi-step investigation, and structured report generation

x402_payment.description: Pay per request with USDC on Base via x402 protocol. No API keys, no accounts — just a wallet.

cogni_dao.description: Agents that contribute earn governance tokens. Work is measured via the attribution ledger.
